title: Soft Habits That Quietly Kill Ambition (Before You Notice) | Ferrum Doctrine
description:
Your ambition didn't die in a crisis. It bled out in habits you call 'harmless.'

Comment KILL LIST with the habit you're executing this week.

Ferrum Doctrine — discipline without apology.
